extortion.description: Law firm experts in social law and social security law in Lille and Paris. Created in 2005, VOLTAIRE AVOCATS advises and defends companies in all areas related to labor law and social security law. Based in Paris, Lille and Lyon, we support our clients both for their daily needs and for more complex operations (PES, social consequences of restructuring, URSSAF control, trade union law ...) both in France and internationally.https://www.voltaire-avocats.com/fr/
